# Mom's Resin Tables

> Handcrafted resin tables, river tables, and live edge tabletop builds made in Safety Harbor, Florida. Ships nationwide.

Mom's Resin Tables is a small-batch handcraft studio specializing in one-of-one epoxy resin tabletops, live edge river tables, and custom commissions. Every piece is built by hand using reclaimed and premium hardwood species combined with pigmented epoxy resin.

## What We Sell

- Ready-to-ship resin tabletop designs (one-of-one pieces)
- Custom resin table commissions (river tables, live edge slabs, chevron builds)
- Artisan decor sets (sculptural resin-wood panels)

## Key Pages

- Homepage and shop: https://momsresintables.com/
- Shop all products: https://momsresintables.com/shop.html
- Start a custom build: https://momsresintables.com/custom.html
- About the studio: https://momsresintables.com/about.html
- Contact and quotes: https://momsresintables.com/contact.html

## Business Details

- Location: Safety Harbor, Florida 34695 (studio — not a retail storefront)
- Ships nationwide from Safety Harbor, FL
- Phone: (727) 279-5289
- Email: support@momsresintables.com
- Price range: $259–$429 for ready-made tops; custom commissions vary

## Product Categories

- Tabletop Designs — live edge, chevron, mosaic, river panel, and stripe builds in hardwood + resin
- Decor — artisan sculptural resin-wood panel sets
- Custom Commissions — fully custom river tables, live edge slabs, and bespoke builds

## Materials

Reclaimed hardwood species including pine, cedar, white oak, ash, hard maple, hickory, cherry, black walnut, mahogany, teak, padauk, and ebony. Paired with pigmented or clear epoxy resin, hand-sanded, and finished with UV-resistant polyurethane.

## Shipping

Ships nationwide via standard freight. Shipping rates vary by product size band ($18–$74 flat rates). Lead time for ready-made pieces is 3–5 business days.

## Policies

- Custom Build Policy: https://momsresintables.com/custom-build-policy.html
- Production Lead Times: https://momsresintables.com/production-lead-times.html
- Refund Policy: https://momsresintables.com/refund-policy.html
- Privacy Policy: https://momsresintables.com/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of Service: https://momsresintables.com/terms-of-service.html
